系统与调度优化: We present FogROS2-FT (Fault Tolerant) to mitigate these issues by introducing a multi-cloud extension that automatically replicates independent stateless robotic services, routes requests to these replicas, and directs the first response back.
the fault tolerance nature of FogROS2-FT allows low-cost 'spot' computing instances that may shutdown unpredictably to be used reliably

codex_annotation.notes: 论文提出面向云机器人的容错系统FogROS2-FT，核心通过服务副本复制、请求路由调度等系统调度方法实现容错，同时降低了计算成本与长尾延迟。

general: EMC2 is an edge-based MoE computing system that fuses sparse 3D point clouds and dense 2D images for robust multimodal representations while optimizing hardware and computational graphs for real-time inference on constrained AV platforms.
系统与调度优化: EMC2 integrates an adaptive multimodal data bridge with multi-scale region proposing and scenario-aware routing, dynamically dispatching features to complementary experts, alongside joint hardware-software optimizations for efficient, low-latency 3D detection.

codex_annotation.notes: 宣称在 Jetson 上比 15 个基线平均提速 159.06%，并在 KITTI/nuScenes 上提升精度；主体为 MoE 系统调度架构。

general: TimeExpert introduces a MoE-based Video-LLM to decompose VTG tasks so temporal localization, saliency scoring, and text generation each receive dedicated processing, improving event modeling.
系统与调度优化: It dynamically routes task-specific tokens (timestamps, saliency scores) to specialized experts with increased efficiency, letting each subtask follow its own pathway.

codex_annotation.notes: TimeExpert’s core contribution is expert-aware routing of VTG tokens within the Video-LLM to specialize processing by subtask.

系统与调度优化: Title: NetMoE: Accelerating MoE Training through Dynamic Sample Placement
Abstract: All-to-All communication has become a notable challenge to training efficiency, so token routing must be reshaped to reduce data exchange overhead.

codex_annotation.notes: NetMoE’s main lever is relocating samples across GPUs to cut MoE All-to-All communication, a scheduling-level optimization.

上下文与缓存优化: 论文摘要指出 DeFT 通过 KV-Guided Grouping 避免重复加载共享前缀的 KV cache，并用 Flattened Tree KV Splitting 使 KV cache 在分区间均匀分布，从而大幅减少 KV cache IO 并提升 GPU 利用率。

codex_annotation.notes: 针对树结构推理场景的 KV cache 复用与 load-balanced partitioning 进行优化。

general: We introduce SemanticDraw, a new paradigm of interactive content creation where high-quality images are generated in near real-time from given multiple hand-drawn regions, each encoding prescribed semantic meaning.

Our proposed framework is generalizable to any existing diffusion models and acceleration schedulers, allowing sub-second (0.64 seconds) image content creation application upon well-established image diffusion models.
系统与调度优化: we increase the generation throughput with our new multi-prompt stream batch pipeline, enabling low-latency generation from multiple, region-based text prompts on a single RTX 2080 Ti GPU.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on pipeline-level serving improvements to make region-guided diffusion generation interactive and low-latency.

系统与调度优化: AgenticIR 跟随感知、调度、执行、反思和重新调度五个关键阶段，模拟人类解题流程以处理复杂图像修复。
AgenticIR 利用 LLM 与 VLM 通过文本生成动态驱动一套图像修复模型工具箱。
general: AgenticIR 是一个面向复杂图像修复问题的 agentic 系统，旨在协调多个专门模型。

codex_annotation.notes: AgenticIR 的核心贡献是基于感知/调度/执行/反思/重新调度的 agentic 编排管线，动态调度多个图像修复模型。

模型压缩: To mitigate this issue, we investigate the efficacy of compression when serving LoRAs.
We propose a method for the joint compression of LoRAs into a shared basis paired with LoRA-specific scaling matrices.
We extend our algorithm to learn clusters of LoRAs that are amenable to joint compression, allowing it to scale gracefully.

codex_annotation.notes: LoRA 共享 basis + 缩放矩阵能在 GPU 内存有限情况下保持 80% throughput，体现模型压缩主线。

模型压缩: To mitigate this issue, we investigate the efficacy of compression when serving LoRAs.
We propose a method for the joint compression of LoRAs into a shared basis paired with LoRA-specific scaling matrices.
We extend our algorithm to learn clusters of LoRAs that are amenable to joint compression, allowing it to scale gracefully.

general: We propose an adaptive approach that sequentially explores the combinatorial hyper-parameter search space and uses low-rank matrix factorization to fill in missing evaluations, cutting typical resources to 5-15% and yielding 85-95% cost savings.
系统与调度优化: We lean on multi-armed bandits to sequentially identify the next (method, validation sample)-pair to evaluate, exploiting early winners and correlations to avoid exhaustive evaluation.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on accelerating LLM evaluation via sequential scheduling rather than changing model architecture.

系统与调度优化: We further propose methods to regulate the router's sparsity while balancing the load among experts. ReMoE’s continuous nature enables efficient dynamic allocation of computation across tokens and layers, while also exhibiting domain specialization. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/94dc604e115237a7f4a758b3146cd976-Abstract-Conference.html))

codex_annotation.notes: ReMoE is a fully differentiable drop-in replacement for TopK+Softmax routing that uses ReLU to keep expert selection smooth and scalable across different expert counts. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/94dc604e115237a7f4a758b3146cd976-Abstract-Conference.html))

general: Sorbet introduces a transformer-based spiking language model that is more neuromorphic hardware-compatible and validates it via GLUE and ablations to show its energy-efficient edge inference potential.
模型压缩: By leveraging knowledge distillation and model quantization, Sorbet achieved a highly compressed binary weight model that maintains competitive performance while achieving 27.16× energy savings compared to BERT.

codex_annotation.notes: Main contribution is quantized/binary-weight spiking transformer for energy-efficient inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向边缘部署的脉冲神经网络语言模型推理优化，明确包含量化/二值权重压缩；同时通过 PTsoftmax 与 BSPN 替换高能耗操作，属于推理侧算子优化。未见明显关于上下文缓存、解码策略或系统调度层面的贡献。

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) deployed for long-context inference face the KV cache as the primary GPU memory and latency bottleneck because the full cache must be loaded at each decoding step.

QuantSpec introduces a self-speculative decoding framework where the draft model shares architecture but runs on a hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache and weights, yielding consistent end-to-end speedups up to ∼2.5× and ~1.3× KV memory reduction.
上下文与缓存优化: QuantSpec’s core acceleration comes from a hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache that lets the speculated decoding process maintain high acceptance rates while cutting cache size and load cost, outperforming prior sparse-KV approaches.

codex_annotation.notes: 主研究在于通过层级量化 KV cache 加速长期上下文推理的 speculative decoding，使上下文/缓存开销成为核心优化杠杆。

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心是面向长上下文 LLM 推理的自推测解码，并以量化 KV cache/权重实现加速与降内存。', '未见算子/内核级实现细节，也不以系统调度为主要贡献，因此未标注系统与调度优化、算子与内核优化。']

general: Title: CryptoMoE: Privacy-Preserving and Scalable Mixture of Experts Inference via Balanced Expert Routing
Abstract: CryptoMoE is the first framework that enables private, efficient, and accurate inference for MoE-based models and balances expert loads to protect routing information.
系统与调度优化: Abstract: CryptoMoE balances expert loads to protect expert routing information and proposes novel protocols for secure expert dispatch and combine.

codex_annotation.notes: Main contribution is secure, load-balanced expert routing and dispatch protocols for MoE inference, i.e., a serving/scheduling optimization.

general: Visual Haystacks (VHs) benchmark exposes limitations of long-context LMMs on multi-image reasoning, cross-image reasoning, and context-bias issues, motivating a vision-centric long-context evaluation.
系统与调度优化: MIRAGE (Multi-Image Retrieval Augmented Generation) is an open-source visual-RAG framework that processes up to 10k images on a single 40G A100 GPU, far surpassing the 1k-image limit of contemporary models, enabling improved multi-image QA performance.

codex_annotation.notes: 提供了新的视觉长上下文基准VHs及开放源码MIRAGE多图检索增强生成框架来提升多图QA效能。

general: MoDr introduces a dynamic multi-branches routing approach for Huginn, shifting linear latent reasoning into a LoRA-based multi-branch dynamic relay mode with a learnable hard-gate routing mechanism.
系统与调度优化: An auxiliary-loss-free load balancing strategy enables effective exploration of the solution space and prevents routing collapse, framing the main contribution as routing/load-balancing improvements to the depth-recurrent inference framework.

codex_annotation.notes: Routing and load-balancing changes to Huginn’s depth-recurrent inference engine are treated as system/scheduling optimizations.

general: An Agentic Framework with LLMs for Solving Complex Vehicle Routing Problems proposes AFL to fully automate the VRP pipeline, directly extracting knowledge from raw inputs and enabling self-contained code generation with performance comparable to hand-designed algorithms.
系统与调度优化: AFL decomposes the overall pipeline into three manageable subtasks and employs four specialized agents whose coordinated interactions enforce cross-functional consistency and logical soundness, indicating the agentic orchestration framework is the core contribution.

codex_annotation.notes: Evidence points to a system-level orchestration of specialized agents for automated VRP solving as the main contribution, so the framework is marked as system/scheduling optimization.

general: Agents based on large language models often face substantial planning latency due to both LLM inefficiency and structural complexity from generating intermediate steps, so the paper presents a human-centered efficient agent planning method to enhance planning efficiency through system design and user interaction.
系统与调度优化: The approach advocates for co-design of the agent system and user interface so the agent system can fluidly manage user interactions and interruptions, integrating human interruptions to expedite the process via human-in-the-loop interactions.

codex_annotation.notes: Abstract emphasizes co-designing the agent system and UI to manage interactions, aligning with system-level scheduling/serving optimization.

系统与调度优化: introduces RaLMSpec, a framework that accelerates iterative retrieval-augmented language model (RaLM) with speculative retrieval and batched verification
introduces several important systems optimizations, including prefetching, optimal speculation stride scheduler, and asynchronous verification

codex_annotation.notes: 主优化对象为LLM，核心优化方法为系统与调度优化，通过推测检索、批验证、预取、调度器等系统级手段提升检索增强大模型的服务性能，符合标注规则要求。

general: OCCAM computes the best classifier assignment strategy over queries (the optimal model portfolio) by solving an ILP to maximize accuracy under cost budgets, reducing cost by ~40% with minimal accuracy loss.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on cost-aware selection/scheduling of classifiers rather than model architecture changes.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve impressive reasoning capabilities at the cost of substantial inference overhead, prompting Roads to Rome (R2R) to introduce a neural token router that selectively uses LLMs only for critical, path-divergent tokens while leaving most token generation to the distilled Small Language Model (SLM).
R2R combines R1-1.5B and R1-32B models and reports a 2.8× wall-clock speedup compared to R1-32B while surpassing R1-7B accuracy, showing better test-time scaling efficiency.
系统与调度优化: Roads to Rome’s neural token router routes divergent tokens to the larger LLM and lets the SLM handle the rest, directly optimizing serving efficiency across models to improve Pareto trade-offs between accuracy and latency.

codex_annotation.notes: Token routing is the core serving-level scheduling lever to minimize large-model inference while preserving reasoning accuracy.

general: TidalDecode introduces position persistent sparse attention to reduce token selection overhead while matching full-attention quality on diverse LLMs and tasks.
解码策略优化: TidalDecode adds token selection layers that perform full attention to identify high-scoring tokens, letting other layers reuse the pre-selected tokens for sparse attention, cutting decoding latency up to 2.1×.

codex_annotation.notes: Main contribution is a decoding-time sparse attention pipeline that persistently selects tokens across layers, shrinking KV cache work without new system or kernel changes.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向LLM解码阶段的稀疏注意力推理优化，重点落在KV cache/长上下文瓶颈、解码系统加速与跨层位置持久稀疏注意力；未明显涉及模型压缩。

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

系统与调度优化: Meta-agent decomposes user queries into sub-tasks for allocation, handles scheduling adjustments, and integrates a feedback loop to keep planning solvable/comprehensive while improving robustness.

codex_annotation.notes: Agent-oriented planning framework (AOP) focuses on decomposition, allocation, and scheduling in multi-agent systems rather than model-level advances.

general: We introduce a novel multi-agent framework designed to enable effective collaboration among heterogeneous robots with varying embodiments and capabilities, along with the Habitat-MAS benchmark to assess embodiment-aware reasoning for planning and execution. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/8ec46cecdae5407662899c5f6698cd8b-Abstract-Conference.html))
系统与调度优化: Robot Resume and the hierarchical multi-agent design guide task planning, assignment, and decentralized execution, indicating the core contribution is system/scheduling orchestration for heterogeneous multi-robot teams. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/8ec46cecdae5407662899c5f6698cd8b-Abstract-Conference.html))

codex_annotation.notes: Framework-level system optimizing planning/assignment across heterogeneous HMRS; no evidence for other optimization labels.

general: Title and abstract emphasize inference scaling for long-context retrieval-augmented generation using LLMs and external knowledge.
系统与调度优化: The paper builds a computation allocation model that predicts optimal inference parameters across budgets and shows scaling inference compute on long-context LLMs with these configs yields large gains, indicating the main contribution is inference allocation and serving-level compute scheduling.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on modeling and optimally allocating inference compute for RAG to boost long-context LLM performance.

general: Abstract states FPX is an adaptive framework that dynamically selects model size and quantization level based on real-time demands to balance latency and quality.

codex_annotation.notes: FPX focuses on runtime serving decisions for latency-sensitive LLM agents, so the system/scheduling tag best captures the core contribution described in title/abstract.

general: EmbedLLM learns compact vector representations of LLMs to support downstream applications involving many models, such as model routing, and forecasts model performance on multiple benchmarks without additional inference cost.
系统与调度优化: Empirical results show EmbedLLM outperforms prior methods in model routing, indicating the learned embeddings are used to improve serving/routing decisions across models.

codex_annotation.notes: Focus is on learning representations to guide model routing across the large pool of LLMs, with open-sourced dataset, code, and embedder for further system-level research.

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

general: Abstract frames sequential recommendation as predicting the next item from user interaction history.
模型压缩: Title "SLMRec: Distilling Large Language Models into Small for Sequential Recommendation" explicitly describes distilling LLMs into smaller models, i.e., model compression for sequential recommendation.

codex_annotation.notes: Only the title and abstract were provided; weaponized distillation is treated as the core compression lever.

human_annotation.notes: 题目明确是序列推荐；“Distilling ... into Small”直接表明通过蒸馏将大模型压缩为小模型，归入模型压缩。

general: LoRA-Mixer routes task-specific LoRA experts into attention projection matrices, giving token-level specialization while remaining drop-in compatible.
Routing Specialization Loss trains routers with global load balance and input-aware specialization, enabling transfers across GSM8K, CoLA, and ARC-C.
系统与调度优化: Hard–soft top-k routing and RSL enforce load balance and selective expert reuse, shaping routers for adaptive token scheduling.

codex_annotation.notes: Modular router reuses public LoRA modules, cutting trainable parameters to 48% while outperforming routing and LoRA-MoE baselines.

general: Sparse RAG encodes retrieved documents in parallel and only attends to highly relevant caches when decoding, reducing the number of documents loaded during decoding and cutting the computation cost of retrieval-augmented inference.
上下文与缓存优化: The sparse mechanism filters out undesirable contexts and speeds up RAG inference by limiting attention to selected caches, thereby reducing the context the model must load during decoding and sharpening focus on relevant information.

codex_annotation.notes: Sparse RAG focuses on selecting and attending to a small subset of retrieved caches to accelerate and improve inference quality.

general: 这是RAG检索的优化，不是模型推理加速

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过稀疏上下文选择与按需访问相关缓存来加速 RAG 推理，重点落在解码阶段的注意力裁剪与上下文/缓存利用优化；未体现模型压缩。

general: 这是RAG检索的优化，不是模型推理加速

系统与调度优化: Our approach leverages self-specialization, which constructs expert modules using self-generated synthetic data, each equipping a shared base LLM with distinct domain-specific capabilities, activated via self-optimized routing. This allows for dynamic and capability-specific handling of various target tasks, enhancing overall capabilities.

codex_annotation.notes: Self-MoE routes requests through modular expert specialists via learned routing, framing the core contribution as improving the serving/routing subsystem of the LLM.

general: We first design a delicate pipeline, MMSearch-Engine, to empower any LMMs with multimodal search capabilities.
On top of this, we introduce MMSearch, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark to assess the multimodal search performance of LMMs.
系统与调度优化: By using MMSearch-Engine, the LMMs are evaluated by performing three individual tasks (requery, rerank, and summarization), and one challenging end-to-end task with a complete searching process, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed pipeline.

codex_annotation.notes: MMSearch couples a dedicated serving-like pipeline with a benchmark and error analysis to guide future multimodal AI search engines.

general: The increasing demand for long-context generation has made the KV cache in large language models a bottleneck in memory consumption.
We propose PolarQuant ... provides a new perspective for key cache quantization and efficiently addresses the outlier dilemma.
上下文与缓存优化: PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and the polar angle, rather than quantizing original key vectors directly.
PolarQuant achieves superior efficiency in KV cache quantization and accelerates the decoding process by turning the query-key inner product into a table lookup.

codex_annotation.notes: Paper introduces PolarQuant to quantize the LLM KV cache, reducing memory cost while accelerating decoding, so it qualifies as a cache/context optimization effort.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向 LLM 长上下文场景的 KV cache 量化，并通过极坐标表示同时带来解码加速；更偏缓存优化，其次可视为量化压缩。

general: Abstract introduces a Mixture of Experts routing study for multilingual LLMs, culminating in the Post-MoE architecture that sparsifies routing only in later layers.
系统与调度优化: The core contribution is a novel MoE routing method with language-family-specific experts and cross-lingual routing, plus the Post-MoE sparse routing schedule for later layers.

codex_annotation.notes: Language-family experts enable scaling to 50 languages without extra parameters.

general: Recent breakthroughs in large language model-driven autonomous agents have revealed that multi-agent collaboration often surpasses each individual through collective reasoning.
Inspired by the neural scaling law—increasing neurons enhances performance, this study explores whether the continuous addition of collaborative agents can yield similar benefits.
Extensive evaluations reveal that it effectively supports collaboration among over a thousand agents, with irregular topologies outperforming regular ones.
系统与调度优化: Technically, we utilize directed acyclic graphs to organize agents into a multi-agent collaboration network (MacNet), upon which their interactive reasoning is topologically orchestrated for autonomous task solving.

general: Title emphasizes an economical communication pipeline for LLM-based multi-agent systems, highlighting the deployment context.
Abstract introduces AgentPrune, a communication framework that prunes redundant or malicious inter-agent messages.
系统与调度优化: AgentPrune formalizes the Communication Redundancy issue in current LLM-based multi-agent pipelines and performs one-shot pruning on the spatial-temporal message-passing graph to produce a more token-economic communication topology.

codex_annotation.notes: Primary contribution is reducing inter-agent communication overhead in LLM agent deployments, which is a system-level scheduling/serving optimization rather than a model or kernel change.

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: MetaDesigner builds a multi-agent framework (Pipeline, Glyph, Texture agents) that orchestrates typography synthesis and iteratively refines design parameters through centralized feedback.
The pipeline leverages multimodal models plus user evaluations to adjust hyperparameters and coordinate customizable WordArt generation.
系统与调度优化: The system’s core contribution is the AI-driven orchestration of agents and feedback loop that dynamically schedules design iterations to meet stylistic preferences.

codex_annotation.notes: Main focus is on the agent-based pipeline coordination rather than a specific LLM model; hence the system/infrastructure object and the scheduling/serving label.

系统与调度优化: NNsight is an open-source system that extends PyTorch to introduce deferred remote execution, and NDIF is a scalable inference service that executes NNsight requests to share GPU resources and pretrained models, demonstrating a serving framework and resource orchestration workflow.

codex_annotation.notes: Framework focuses on scalable inference and resource sharing infrastructure for analyzing large models, so the main contribution is systems and scheduling optimization rather than model algorithms.

general: ScaleKV 分析 VAR 转换器各层的注意力模式，将其分为需要更多缓存的 drafters 和可用更小缓存的 refiners，从而实施分层缓存管理。
针对 Infinity 文本图像 VAR，ScaleKV 将 KV cache 内存压缩到原来的 10% 仍保持像素级保真度。
上下文与缓存优化: ScaleKV 通过识别不同尺度的 attention 需求，提供 scale-aware 的 KV cache 压缩机制，属于上下文/缓存管理的核心优化。
评估显示相比原始 VAR pipeline，压缩后的 KV cache 内存需求显著下降，是为减小上下文/缓存开销所做的主贡献。

codex_annotation.notes: ScaleKV 的核心贡献是对 Visual Autoregressive 推理过程中的 KV cache 进行分层压缩与管理。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向视觉自回归生成推理的 KV cache 压缩与分层/分尺度缓存管理，最匹配上下文与缓存优化；同时包含按层与按尺度进行差异化资源分配，符合系统与调度优化。未见解码策略本身改造、模型压缩训练或算子内核级优化。

general: CodeGEMM replaces dequantization-based GEMM with a codebook-centric kernel that gathers precomputed centroid-activation inner products, cutting per-element lookups and on-chip pressure to explore latency–memory–accuracy trade-offs.

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心贡献是面向量化 LLM 推理的 GEMM 内核设计，而非提出新的压缩方法本身。', '量化与 codebook 是问题设定与目标场景，因此更适合作为 target_preference_labels 中的“模型压缩”。']

general: SpeCache offloads the complete KV cache to CPU memory and dynamically fetches important KV pairs back into VRAM via a low-precision copy to manage long-context LLM inference without retraining.
上下文与缓存优化: SpeCache speculatively predicts the KV pairs the next token will attend to so it can prefetch them before each decoding step, enabling parallel prefetching and computation while reducing VRAM usage and avoiding information forgetting.

codex_annotation.notes: SpeCache’s core lever is KV cache management with speculative prefetching across CPU/GPU to sustain long-sequence decoding.

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是 KV cache 的分层存储、按重要性回取与推测式预取，属于缓存优化并带有系统调度特征。', '虽然摘要提到 high KV cache compression ratio，但方法重点不是量化/剪枝式模型压缩，而是无遗忘的缓存卸载与预取。']

系统与调度优化: Section 3.6 describes how the system first infers the suitable resolution per concept, then uses LR-only disagreement scores under a user-specified HR budget to sample which regions merit expensive HR imagery, making the budget-aware allocation of HR data the central contribution. ([cs.cornell.edu](https://www.cs.cornell.edu/~revankar/Scale_Aware.pdf))

codex_annotation.notes: The unified pipeline also distills HR models for LR inference and uses an LLM to infer concept scale, but the driving optimization lever is the scheduling of high-resolution acquisition within resource constraints. ([cs.cornell.edu](https://www.cs.cornell.edu/~revankar/Scale_Aware.pdf))

general: Paper focuses on KV caching for LLM inference, modeling eviction versus routing trade-offs in multi-LLM serving under limited memory. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18999?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: Proposes randomized KV cache eviction plus learning-based routing to balance hit rate and load, showing large hit-rate and throughput gains across benchmarks. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18999?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: ['Joint model and algorithms for cache eviction and routing deliver latency, TTFT, and throughput wins, confirming the cache focus. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18999?utm_source=openai))']

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心明确围绕 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 复用与受限内存下的淘汰策略优化；标题中的 query load balancing 也指向调度/负载均衡视角。

general: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) rely on key–value (KV) caching to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive inference.
The cache size grows linearly with the input sequence length, quickly becoming a bottleneck for long-context tasks.
上下文与缓存优化: LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter-efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores for KV cache eviction without costly draft generation, ensuring superior accuracy and lower eviction cost.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on long-context KV cache eviction accuracy and cost reduction for LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向长上下文推理的 KV Cache eviction / compression 优化，直接对应上下文与缓存优化；未明显涉及解码策略或系统调度层面的核心方法贡献。

general: The paper identifies gradient conflict among tokens routed to the same expert in LVLM MoE layers and introduces token-level gradient analysis to detect such conflicts.
A regularization loss reroutes conflicting tokens to other experts, directly altering the routing decisions to mitigate interference during inference.
系统与调度优化: The core contribution is a router-focused regularization that encourages conflicting tokens to move to other experts, explicitly optimizing token-to-expert routing behavior.

codex_annotation.notes: Routing regularization is the primary optimization lever, so the paper is tagged under system and scheduling optimization.

general: Meeting service-level objectives (SLOs) in Large Language Models (LLMs) serving is critical … this paper proposes NestedFP … overlaying FP8 parameters onto FP16 parameters … specialized GEMM kernel … provides a flexible platform for dynamic, SLO-aware precision selection.
系统与调度优化: NestedFP provides a flexible platform for dynamic, SLO-aware precision selection.

codex_annotation.notes: 在 LLM 服务层面通过双精度模型动态切换与内存复用来满足 SLO，是系统级调度优化。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦LLM推理服务中的双精度切换与内存复用，核心贡献覆盖SLO感知调度、专用GEMM内核以及以共享FP16占用实现FP8/FP16双模型支持的压缩式表示；未见与上下文或KV缓存优化直接相关的内容。

general: Cake introduces a KV cache loading system that balances computation and I/O resources to reduce Time to First Token.
Adaptive scheduling integrates with non-prefix caching requests and improves throughput across hardware, datasets, and storage conditions.
上下文与缓存优化: Prefix caching stores KV caches for reuse but suffers from I/O latency; Cake’s bidirectional scheduler dynamically balances KV cache computation and loading to optimize long-context inference.

codex_annotation.notes: KV cache loading/scheduling is the core optimization lever, so the context-and-cache label is selected.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦长上下文 LLM 推理中的 KV cache 复用与加载，核心贡献同时落在缓存优化与系统调度优化。

general: Reinforcement learning (RL) is crucial for aligning Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but its practical application is hampered by significant system-level bottlenecks.
系统与调度优化: The typical RL pipeline, encompassing data loading, inference-based rollouts, and model updates, suffers from severe inefficiencies when applied to VLMs due to the extreme heterogeneity of multimodal data, leaving expensive GPU resources underutilized.
Existing systems either focus on text-only RL or employ general load-balancing techniques that are incompatible with the small-batch, iterative nature of RL training.

codex_annotation.notes: Optimizes load balancing and data-loading bottlenecks specific to VLM RL pipelines.

general: GateSkip introduces per-branch sigmoid-linear residual-stream gates that compress outputs before re-entering the residual stream, enabling token-wise layer skipping.
解码策略优化: During inference we rank tokens by the gate and skip low-importance ones using a per-layer budget, yielding adaptive compute savings while retaining accuracy.

codex_annotation.notes: GateSkip fine-tunes pretrained decoder-only models with differentiable gates to skip layers selectively at inference time, keeping quality while cutting compute and complementing other compression techniques.

human_annotation.notes: 工作核心是通过残差门控实现按 token 的层跳过，属于模型结构侧的推理计算优化，而非解码策略本身。

general: High-resolution Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are widely used... Processing such a large number of visual tokens poses significant computational challenges, particularly for resource-constrained commodity GPUs.
上下文与缓存优化: We propose High-Resolution Early Dropping (HiRED), a plug-and-play token-dropping method designed to operate within a fixed token budget... leverage the attention of the CLS token in the vision transformer (ViT) to assess the visual content of the image partitions and allocate an optimal token budget for each partition accordingly, selecting the most informative visual tokens from each partition within the allocated budget and passing them to the subsequent Large Language Model (LLM).

codex_annotation.notes: HiRED explicitly drops less-informative visual tokens under a tight budget, so the authors focus on token/attention budget management rather than serving, decoding, or kernel-specific efforts.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是针对高分辨率VLM推理阶段的视觉token裁剪与预算分配，属于Negative，而非缓存、调度或算子内核优化。

general: 摘要指出为处理超高清多曝光动态图像而切分长序列输入，并采用 attention cache 再压缩缓存，目的在资源有限的单张 GPU 上高效完成任务。
上下文与缓存优化: 摘要提到“attention cache technique, which is similar to the KV cache for infinite data stream processing”并进一步提到“attention cache compression to alleviate the storage burden”，说明主要优化焦点在上下文/缓存机制。

codex_annotation.notes: 核心贡献是通过 sliced inputs 与 attention cache（含压缩）降低长上下文处理的负担，符合上下文与缓存优化。

human_annotation.notes: 该工作本体属于计算机视觉中的UHD多曝光图像融合；与偏好最直接相关的是长序列处理中的缓存与压缩机制，未见算子/内核级优化的明确证据。

general: Title and abstract describe VPNs framework that uses customized Visual Prompts to upgrade neural network sparsification for vision models and explores data-model co-design for pruning.
模型压缩: Abstract emphasizes joint optimization of prompt-conditioned inputs and model topology to promote superior weight sparsity, showing VPNs outperform state-of-the-art pruning algorithms and transfer better across vision datasets.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是计算机视觉场景下的网络剪枝/稀疏化，通过视觉提示优化稀疏子网发现，明显属于模型压缩，不属于 LLM 上下文缓存或系统调度优化。

general: SVS refines pruned weights for generative models such as StyleGAN2/3 and DDPM to improve compression performance across GAN and Diffusion models.
模型压缩: The method minimizes disparities between singular values of pruned weights, guiding compressed models toward better fine-tuning and speeding up compression without extra training.

codex_annotation.notes: ['Focus is on pruned-weight refinement for generative-model compression.']

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是生成模型压缩，方法通过奇异值缩放改进剪枝权重初始化，覆盖GAN与Diffusion；不属于系统与调度优化。

模型压缩: This paper focuses on compressing decoder-only transformer-based autoregressive models through structural weight pruning to improve the model efficiency while preserving performance for both language and image generation tasks and proposes a training-free pruning method plus a compensation algorithm to recover the pruned model.

codex_annotation.notes: Structural weight pruning and recovery are applied directly to decoder-only autoregressive models to reduce memory use and speed up generation, so the core contribution is model compression.

human_annotation.notes: 核心贡献是针对自回归 Transformer 的结构化剪枝与补偿恢复，明显属于模型压缩；摘要未体现解码、缓存、调度或内核优化的直接方法贡献。

general: ScaleOT’s abstract explains that offsite tuning protects privacy by compressing LLM layers through a layerwise lossy compression algorithm combined with harmonizers, and adds rank reduction to further shrink the original layers while keeping utility nearly intact.
模型压缩: The core method is a layerwise lossy compression algorithm that learns each layer’s importance via reinforcement learning, replaces layers with harmonizers, and applies rank reduction to compress the LLM layers and improve privacy.

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要明确将主要贡献定位在压缩原始 LLM 层以提升隐私和效用的平衡。

human_annotation.notes: 论文主体是面向LLM的离线调优压缩框架，核心贡献集中在分层有损压缩、层替换与低秩压缩，明显属于模型压缩；“系统与调度优化”证据不足，未纳入。

general: We choose to optimize the input data at the fine-grained level of tokens, cleverly preserving the original text structure.
Each action is a binary decision process to decide whether to retain a specific token information, and the agent learns token selection probabilities to refine the input.

codex_annotation.notes: RTLIR learns to drop or keep tokens to refine LLM input, targeting token-level context management.

human_annotation.notes: 论文属于 LLM 输入优化/提示改写方向，核心是基于强化学习进行 token 级输入筛选，不是解码、KV cache、调度、算子内核、推理结构优化或模型压缩。

general: Serving LLMs requires substantial memory because the KV cache grows with sequence length.
上下文与缓存优化: QJL quantizes the KV cache to 3 bits while cutting memory usage and keeping accuracy.

codex_annotation.notes: QJL couples a Johnson-Lindenstrauss sketch with sign-bit quantization to avoid storing per-block constants, offering an unbiased inner-product estimator with a lightweight CUDA kernel.

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是 KV cache 量化，直接对应上下文与缓存优化。', '量化压缩方法本身属于模型压缩范畴。', '文中包含 lightweight CUDA kernel 与更快 runtime，可归入算子与内核优化，但不宜扩展到系统与调度优化。']

general: CSR converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights, making the KV cache more memory-efficient for inference in long-context LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: The abstract highlights CSR’s sparse representation of the KV cache plus NeuralDict’s learned dictionary so that the KV cache footprint shrinks without harming functionality.

codex_annotation.notes: The paper’s main contribution is reducing KV cache memory pressure via sparse representations for LLM inference in memory-constrained settings.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 稀疏表示与量化压缩，在长上下文和内存受限场景下降低缓存占用。

general: LLM serving is facing sustainability pressure from expensive modern hardware, so the talk traverses contributions on modularized LLM architecture, in-storage sustainable computing, and reliable serving to better reuse existing resources.

Deploying and executing LLMs on broad serving platforms is challenging due to resource limits, therefore exploring how to use outdated hardware collectively improves sustainability, efficiency, and reliability.
系统与调度优化: Wide usage of LLM serving at edge hardware, personal devices, and enterprise infrastructures motivates recycling outdated and resource-constrained GPUs via modularized architectures and in-storage computing to relieve resource pressure.

Particularly emphasizing modularized LLM architecture, in-storage sustainable computing, and reliable serving suggests the main lever is improving how LLM services are scheduled and hosted across constrained hardware.

codex_annotation.notes: Talk centers on reusing outdated GPUs and modular components to make LLM serving more sustainable and reliable.

general: LLM serving is facing sustainability pressure from expensive modern hardware, so the talk traverses contributions on modularized LLM architecture, in-storage sustainable computing, and reliable serving to better reuse existing resources.

Deploying and executing LLMs on broad serving platforms is challenging due to resource limits, therefore exploring how to use outdated hardware collectively improves sustainability, efficiency, and reliability.
系统与调度优化: Wide usage of LLM serving at edge hardware, personal devices, and enterprise infrastructures motivates recycling outdated and resource-constrained GPUs via modularized architectures and in-storage computing to relieve resource pressure.

Particularly emphasizing modularized LLM architecture, in-storage sustainable computing, and reliable serving suggests the main lever is improving how LLM services are scheduled and hosted across constrained hardware.

模型压缩: Compression-aware computing integrates compression techniques like sparsification, quantization, and low-rank decomposition to enhance efficiency while preserving performance.
general: The talk focuses on customizing large-scale generative AI models for cost-effective, resource-constrained devices by making them aware of their compressed states.

codex_annotation.notes: Framework emphasizes compression to make generative models scalable and accessible across constrained hardware.

human_annotation.notes: 主题聚焦生成式与大规模AI模型在受限设备上的压缩感知计算，核心对应模型压缩；未见上下文缓存、系统调度或算子内核层面的具体方法证据。

模型压缩: leverage modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.
general: Probabilistic inference is a fundamental challenge spanning approximate Bayesian inference to generative AI.

codex_annotation.notes: Talk centers on accelerating probabilistic generative-model inference via low-precision/sparsity compute, making model compression the main optimization lever.

human_annotation.notes: ['主题核心是可扩展高效的概率推断，覆盖贝叶斯深度学习与生成建模，不是以 LLM 为唯一主对象。', '“low-precision and sparsity”直接对应压缩/稀疏化方向；“leverages modern accelerators”体现系统实现与推理加速取向。', '离散域利用梯度信息进行更有方向的探索属于推断算法改进，但不直接落入给定偏好标签集合。']

上下文与缓存优化: While 4-bit quantization is memory-optimal for non-reasoning models, the paper shows that KV cache rather than model size can dominate memory for reasoning workloads, so deployment decisions must prioritize cache management. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10964))

The authors run 1,700 inference configurations and find a scale-dependent trade-off that even decides whether KV cache eviction outperforms KV quantization, highlighting cache-focused strategies. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10964))

codex_annotation.notes: Focus is on memory-optimal deployment for reasoning LLMs, emphasizing when to trade off KV cache versus model capacity/quantization based on scale. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.10964))

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦推理模型的内存最优配置，核心证据直接涉及 KV cache 与量化位宽选择，属于缓存/上下文优化与模型压缩交叉主题。

general: Large Language Model (LLM) inference is typically memory-intensive, especially when processing large batch sizes and long sequences, due to the large size of key-value (KV) cache, motivating KV cache compression. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: NSNQuant is a calibration-free vector quantization technique designed for low-bit compression of the KV cache by aligning token distributions through a double-normalization pipeline, enabling robust quantization without calibration datasets. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: NSNQuant focuses on KV cache quantization (token distribution alignment with a standard normal, via Normalize-Shift-Normalize plus Hadamard) to shrink memory and boost throughput for LLM inference, rather than modifying decoder, kernel, or system scheduling layers. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 低比特量化，以降低缓存带来的内存开销，属于缓存优化与模型压缩交叉方向。

general: Accelerating large language model (LLM) inference for high throughput deployment, focusing on contextual sparsity shifting cost toward attention heads.
Polar Sparsity introduces Selective Head Attention and sparsity-aware GPU kernels to scale contextual sparsity to large batch sizes while keeping accuracy stable.
算子与内核优化: Selective Head Attention is paired with hardware-efficient, sparsity-aware GPU kernels, delivering up to 2.2× end-to-end speedups across OPT, LLaMA-2/3, Qwen, and Mistral at various batch sizes and sequence lengths.

codex_annotation.notes: 主贡献是通过面向 attention head 的稀疏 GPU kernel 加速推理流水线，属于算子/内核层面的优化。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦大批量 LLM 推理加速，核心贡献在注意力头稀疏与稀疏感知 GPU kernel；未直接讨论 KV cache/上下文管理，也不是典型模型压缩或调度论文。

general: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has emerged as a promising solution to reduce computational overhead by selectively activating subsets of model parameters.

codex_annotation.notes: TC-MoE introduces a ternary expert choice mechanism to route inference compute to fewer experts, so the core optimization is scheduling which experts are activated.

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

general: The abstract frames the work as improving retrieval with expressive learned similarity functions, proves MoL is a universal approximator for such similarities, and applies it to sequential retrieval and QA models.
系统与调度优化: They propose an approximate top-K retrieval technique with MoL plus a new mutual information-based load balancing loss, achieving up to 105× latency improvements while matching recall, which is the core operational optimization described.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on efficient top-K retrieval via MoL and load balancing rather than improving core model architectures.

human_annotation.primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

resolved_annotation.primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

模型压缩: Title references 'LLM Sparsity' with Surrogate-Free ADMM, implying compression focus.
Abstract says 'Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate excessive computational and memory requirements of LLMs.'

codex_annotation.notes: Paper centers on pruning LLMs to reduce compute/memory, so the model compression tag is the core optimization lever.

human_annotation.notes: 标题与摘要明确聚焦于LLM剪枝/稀疏化，属于模型压缩方向。

模型压缩: Title references 'LLM Sparsity' with Surrogate-Free ADMM, implying compression focus.
Abstract says 'Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate excessive computational and memory requirements of LLMs.'

general: Abstract: "We propose a serving system that employs similarity-based expert consolidation to reduce the overall memory footprint by sharing similar experts across models" and "to ensure output quality, we introduce runtime partial reconfiguration, dynamically replacing non-expert layers when processing requests from different models" while maintaining throughput and TTFT comparable to single-model serving.
系统与调度优化: Serving system for multi-tenant MoE LLMs that consolidates similar experts and performs runtime partial reconfiguration to reduce memory usage and keep throughput competitive on a single GPU.

codex_annotation.notes: Authors validate a serving-level optimization for multi-tenant MoE LLM deployment, so we flag the system/scheduling improvement as the primary contribution.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是多租户单卡上的多MoE-LLM高效服务，重点在服务系统设计与MoE结构级重构，不直接聚焦缓存、解码或底层算子内核优化。

general: Abstract: "We propose a serving system that employs similarity-based expert consolidation to reduce the overall memory footprint by sharing similar experts across models" and "to ensure output quality, we introduce runtime partial reconfiguration, dynamically replacing non-expert layers when processing requests from different models" while maintaining throughput and TTFT comparable to single-model serving.
系统与调度优化: Serving system for multi-tenant MoE LLMs that consolidates similar experts and performs runtime partial reconfiguration to reduce memory usage and keep throughput competitive on a single GPU.
introduce the pre-gating router decoupled from the MoE backbone that facilitates system-friendly pre-computing and lookahead scheduling, enhancing expert-aware batching and caching
Our codesign therefore addresses critical gaps on both the algorithmic and system fronts, establishing a scalable and efficient alternative for LLM inference in resource-constrained settings

codex_annotation.notes: 本文提出Read-ME框架，将预训练稠密LLM转换为路由解耦的MoE模型，避免从头训练MoE的高昂成本，通过算法与系统协同设计优化推理效率，在MMLU上最高提升10.1%，端到端延迟最高降低6.1%

general: Modern DP training assumes balanced workloads, but LLM post-training exhibits large sequence variance, so the authors revisit parameter servers and propose On-Demand Communication (ODC) that adapts PS into FSDP with point-to-point communication to reduce synchronization barriers and decouple device workloads.
系统与调度优化: ODC replaces collective all-gather and reduce-scatter with direct point-to-point communication, reducing synchronization from once per layer to once per minibatch so faster workers are no longer stalled and enabling simpler, more effective minibatch-level load balancing, which boosts throughput across imbalanced LLM tasks.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on improving scheduling and load balancing for imbalanced LLM post-training workloads by reintroducing PS-style communication.

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: As online cloud services expand rapidly, layer-7 load balancing has become indispensable for maintaining service availability and performance. The emergence of programmable switches with both high performance and a certain degree of flexibility has made it possible to apply programmable switches to load balancing.

codex_annotation.notes: Focus on accelerating layer-7 load balancing by addressing programmable-switch limitations in memory and update speed.

human_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

resolved_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: 摘要强调 CompactFusion 在多卡并行推理下压缩激活通信以提升扩散模型部署效率与质量。
系统与调度优化: CompactFusion 通过 Residual Compression 仅传输步间激活差分，显著减少跨设备通信，从而在慢网络和并行设置中获取数倍速度提升。

codex_annotation.notes: 主贡献是为并行扩散推理的服务层通信开销设计残差压缩，属于系统/调度层面的优化杠杆。

系统与调度优化: Preble提出首个面向提示共享的分布式LLM服务平台，设计了新的调度算法与分层调度机制，协同优化KV状态复用与计算负载均衡，显著压低平均与p99延迟。 ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5bc342f48de8264779952fac378f96dc-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: Preble通过prompt-aware distributed scheduling in serving workloads with shared prefixes, achieving 1.5×–14.5× avg latency and 2×–10× p99 latency improvements over prior distributed serving systems. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5bc342f48de8264779952fac378f96dc-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

human_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

系统与调度优化: Preble提出首个面向提示共享的分布式LLM服务平台，设计了新的调度算法与分层调度机制，协同优化KV状态复用与计算负载均衡，显著压低平均与p99延迟。 ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5bc342f48de8264779952fac378f96dc-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

general: 提出静态8bit per-tensor量化，抑制Selective SSM输入激活大值并对输出使用Hadamard变换以避免Outlier，从而支持Mamba 2.8B与Jamba 52B等SSM在云/边缘部署。
量化后在Nvidia Orin Nano 8G上生成延迟下降1.72倍，zero-shot准确率仅下降0.9%，52B模型仅下降1%准确率，展示硬件加速和低精度可扩展性。

系统与调度优化: We introduce Encode-Prefill-Decode (EPD) Disaggregation, a novel framework that separates the encoding, prefill, and decode stages onto dedicated resources.
a module for optimal resource allocation for disaggregated serving
a novel role-switching method to handle changing workload characteristics.

codex_annotation.notes: EPD disaggregation decouples stage execution across dedicated resources while adding resource-allocation and workload role-switching to improve multimodal model serving SLOs.

general: Large-language-model inference with long contexts often produces key–value (KV) caches whose footprint exceeds the capacity of high-bandwidth memory on a GPU.
上下文与缓存优化: Prior LLM inference frameworks such as vLLM mitigate this pressure by swapping KV cache pages to host DRAM, while HiFC introduces a DRAM-free swapping scheme that stores KV pages in pseudo-SLC regions of SSDs and enables direct transfers between SSD and GPU to bypass host DRAM.

general: The paper introduces R2-T2, which locally optimizes MoE routing weight vectors at test time by moving them toward the vectors of correctly predicted neighbors, improving multimodal accuracy without retraining the base model. ([proceedings.mlr.press](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/li25bc.html))
系统与调度优化: The core contribution is dynamic rerouting: reweighting and mixing expert representations per input via inference-time optimization of routing vectors, i.e., changing how requests are routed across experts, to fix suboptimal pretraining routers. ([proceedings.mlr.press](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/li25bc.html))

codex_annotation.notes: Gains stem from improving how the system schedules and routes inputs to MoE experts during inference, so the scheduling reroute is the primary leveraged optimization. ([proceedings.mlr.press](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/li25bc.html))

系统与调度优化: To alleviate the above performance problems, we propose a novel routing strategy that combines load balance and locality by converting partial inter-node communication to that of intra-node.

The experiment results demonstrate that the proposed LocMoE reduces training time per epoch by 12.68% to 22.24% compared to classical routers, such as hash router and switch router, without impacting the model accuracy.

codex_annotation.notes: 论文针对大语言模型MoE训练存在的负载不均衡、All-to-All通信时延高、计算冗余问题，提出结合负载均衡与局部性的新型路由策略，核心优化方向属于系统与调度优化范畴。

general: Guiding Mixture-of-Experts with quantified temporal multimodal interactions to improve routing and expert specialization in MoE-based multimodal models.
系统与调度优化: A multimodal interaction-aware router learns to dispatch tokens to experts based on the nature of their interactions, guiding MoE routing via temporal interaction dynamics.

codex_annotation.notes: 核心是在 MoE 路由/调度层引入跨模态时序关系以优化专家分配。

general: Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests.

Existing context caching requires exact prefix matches across requests, limiting reuse cases in settings such as few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation, where immutable content remains unchanged across requests but is preceded by varying prefixes.
上下文与缓存优化: Authors focus on position-independent caching to reuse KV vectors even when prior prefixes change, highlighting context caching as the core serving optimization for complex prompts.

codex_annotation.notes: 主线在提升 LLM 推理服务中上下文缓存的复用能力，明确属于上下文与缓存优化。

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular bricks (vision, audio, language) and maps each onto the ideal accelerator while coordinating shared memory with a token-aware buffer manager, enabling a battery-powered device to run LLaVA and LLaMA-3 offline with higher throughput and energy efficiency than prior implementations. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05109?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: Module-level dynamic offloading and scheduling across heterogeneous NPUs/GPUs/CPUs on unified-memory SoCs is the core contribution, letting each multimodal module execute where it runs best while bypassing CPU bottlenecks. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05109?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: Custom software-hardware co-design cuts energy use by 42.3% and GPU memory by 11.2%, supporting nearly half-day LLaVA vision and ~20.8-hour LLaMA-3 voice inference on a single charge. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05109?utm_source=openai))

general: Title: ICaRus: Identical Cache Reuse for Efficient Multi-Model Inference.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Multi model inference ... each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on reusing KV cache across models to reduce memory during multi-model inference.

上下文与缓存优化: abstract: Introduces Delta-guided Two stage Pruning (DTP) that progressively reduces token redundancy through selective early-layer pruning and complete late-layer pruning, deriving token importance from Mamba’s parameters to decide which tokens to remove.

codex_annotation.notes: Token pruning is the core contribution, so only the上下文与缓存优化 label applies.

上下文与缓存优化: abstract: Introduces Delta-guided Two stage Pruning (DTP) that progressively reduces token redundancy through selective early-layer pruning and complete late-layer pruning, deriving token importance from Mamba’s parameters to decide which tokens to remove.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs)-based text retrieval requires efficient online query encoding; LightRetriever keeps a full LLM for document encoding but shrinks online query encoding to at most an embedding lookup, yielding over 1,000× query encoding speedup and 10× end-to-end throughput improvement.
系统与调度优化: The method targets serving deeply parameterized LLMs by replacing costly query encoders with lightweight lookups to cut real-time inference workload, dramatically increasing retrieval throughput on an A800 GPU.

codex_annotation.notes: LightRetriever’s main contribution is a serving architecture that slims query encoding to accelerate LLM-based retrieval serving.

general: Autoregressive models, often built on Transformer architectures, represent a powerful paradigm for generating ultra-long videos by synthesizing content in sequential chunks; however, this sequential generation process is notoriously slow.
上下文与缓存优化: Caching strategies have proven effective for accelerating traditional video diffusion models, and the paper highlights that existing methods assume uniform denoising across all frames, which breaks down in autoregressive models with varying similarity patterns—motivating new caching treatments for these models.

codex_annotation.notes: 聚焦 autoregressive 视频生成的缓存优化。

general: Autoregressive models, often built on Transformer architectures, represent a powerful paradigm for generating ultra-long videos by synthesizing content in sequential chunks; however, this sequential generation process is notoriously slow.
上下文与缓存优化: Caching strategies have proven effective for accelerating traditional video diffusion models, and the paper highlights that existing methods assume uniform denoising across all frames, which breaks down in autoregressive models with varying similarity patterns—motivating new caching treatments for these models.

general: Abstract highlights SpaceServe as a serving system that space-multiplexes MLLMs by decoupling modality encoders from the decoder and co-locating them on a single GPU through fine-grained SM partitioning, avoiding time-multiplexed idle SM or HBM periods. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))

Evaluation highlights SpaceServe reducing time-per-output-token by 4.81× on average and up to 28.9× on Nvidia A100 GPUs by overlapping encoder and decoder workloads. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: SpaceServe relies on a cost-model-guided Space-Inference Scheduler (SIS) that dynamically assigns SM slices and a Time-Windowed Shortest-Remaining-First (TWSRFT) batching policy for encoder requests to minimize completion latency and smooth decoder arrivals. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: 空分复用服务系统通过 SIS/TWSRFT 算法实现编码器和解码器的协同调度以降低推理时延。

general: Increasing DNN size necessitates effective model compression to reduce compute and memory footprints for deployment on resource-constrained platforms.
Paper experimentally evaluates sparsity and quantization across LLMs (OPT, LLaMA) and vision models (ViT, ResNet) to guide efficient inference.
模型压缩: Authors prove sparsity and quantization are non-orthogonal, show order matters, and that compounded errors from combining them hurt accuracy, guiding best practices for accuracy-preserving compression.

codex_annotation.notes: 主要贡献在于研究稀疏化与量化联合使用时的相互影响，以优化模型压缩顺序并指导高效部署。

general: Increasing DNN size necessitates effective model compression to reduce compute and memory footprints for deployment on resource-constrained platforms.
Paper experimentally evaluates sparsity and quantization across LLMs (OPT, LLaMA) and vision models (ViT, ResNet) to guide efficient inference.
模型压缩: Authors prove sparsity and quantization are non-orthogonal, show order matters, and that compounded errors from combining them hurt accuracy, guiding best practices for accuracy-preserving compression.

上下文与缓存优化: FreeKV pairs speculative KV retrieval with hybrid CPU/GPU layouts and double-buffered streamed recall to hide transfers while keeping near-lossless accuracy, making KV cache retrieval the core optimization target. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

codex_annotation.notes: FreeKV is an algorithm-system co-optimization that accelerates KV cache retrieval for LLM inference, reporting up to 13× speedups with minimal accuracy degradation. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

general: Title states “Oracle-MoE: Locality-preserving Routing in the Oracle Space for Memory-constrained Large Language Model Inference,” showing the core work is routing/scheduling for LLM serving under tight memory.
Abstract highlights deploying MoE LLMs on edge devices with limited memory budgets, underscoring inference-serving constraints.
系统与调度优化: The paper’s locality-preserving routing method is a serving-level optimization that decides expert selection and placement to keep memory consumption bounded while running MoE inference.

codex_annotation.notes: Routing-focused method for MoE inference under tight memory clearly targets serving/scheduling efficiency rather than model internals.

general: DFloat11 is a lossless compression framework that reduces LLM and diffusion model size by 30% while preserving bit-for-bit identical outputs, enabling longer generation lengths and supporting massive models on single nodes.
模型压缩: DFloat11 applies entropy coding to BFloat16 weights, assigning dynamic-length encodings per frequency and adding transformer-block-level decompression via a custom GPU kernel to achieve near information-optimal compression without precision loss.

codex_annotation.notes: 核心贡献在于模型参数的无损压缩与高效解码，使大型生成模型在固定 GPU 预算下可推理更长上下文。

general: Recent study benchmarks cost-efficiency of LLM serving over heterogeneous GPU resources and designs a MILP-based scheduler to match GPU composition, deployment, and workloads to diverse demand.
系统与调度优化: The scheduling algorithm deduces the most cost-efficient serving plan under price budget and realtime GPU availability constraints and outperforms homogeneous and heterogeneous baselines across workload traces and multi-model serving scenarios.

codex_annotation.notes: Main contribution is the LLM serving scheduler over heterogenous cloud GPUs, so system/scheduling optimization is the dominant lever.

general: Abstract explains LLM training is distributed across many accelerators and DiLoCo groups them into workers so synchronizations across workers can happen less frequently and tolerate lower-bandwidth links.
系统与调度优化: Authors improve DiLoCo by synchronizing only subsets of parameters in sequence, allowing workers to keep training during synchronization, and quantizing exchanged data to reduce peak bandwidth and wall-clock time.

codex_annotation.notes: Targets DiLoCo worker synchronization to cut communication bandwidth and runtime for billion-parameter LLM training.

general: KV cache grows linearly with context length, creating memory bottlenecks. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))
ChanMix mixes channel-aware bit allocations via Triton kernels for low-bit quantization. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))
上下文与缓存优化: ChanMix quantizes the KV cache with channel-aware bit reallocation to support longer contexts and larger batches. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))

codex_annotation.notes: Targets KV cache quantization, enabling 2.3× batch size and 1.5× longer context gains per the ICLR 2026 poster. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/forum?id=yjr2jX41qO))

general: Adaptive KV updates for diffusion LLMs reduce redundant recomputation across denoising steps.
Elastic-Cache achieves consistent decoding speedups with minimal accuracy loss on GSM8K, longer sequences, and HumanEval.
上下文与缓存优化: Elastic-Cache decides when/where to refresh caches via attention-aware drift tests and depth-aware schedules, reusing shallow-layer and off-window MASK caches to minimize redundant KV recomputation.

codex_annotation.notes: Focused on KV cache reuse to accelerate decoding for diffusion LLMs.
